ChangePassword.Passwords should be at least 6 character: Passwords should be at least 6 characters long
ChangePassword.Use a variety of numbers, letters, and c: Use a variety of numbers, letters, and characters
ChangePassword.Check the strength of your passwords: Check the strength of your passwords
ChangePassword.Periodically Change: Changing the passwords you create for your various accounts can give you the assurance that you are taking all the necessary steps to keep your accounts and data secure.
ChangePassword.Password Strength: Password strength checkers like LastPass allow people to verify the effectiveness of the passwords they create.
ChangePassword.Reliability: Password managers are a great tool for people who have trouble understanding and organizing their passwords.
ChangePassword.Variety: Accounts that have complex passwords that include many numbers, letters, and characters are less likely to be accessed by hackers.
ChangePassword.Avoid Wi-Fi: Using public Wi-Fi without a VPN can allow hackers to track your online presence and potentially expose data on your device, including saved credentials.
ChangePassword.Never share password: Sharing your passwords with friends or family puts the cybersecurity of your personal accounts at risk.
ChangePassword.priority: The longer your password is, the harder it is for hackers to guess it.
ChangePassword.Don't use personal Info: Using personal information such as name, date of birth, address, or phone number in a password can compromise its effectiveness against cyber attacks.
ChangePassword.Randomize: Yapping random patterns and sequences of letters, numbers, and characters in a password can help protect against password spraying attacks.
ChangePassword.Never reuse pass: Reusing old passwords puts your accounts at risk of cyber attacks.

D1: Money can be transferred to the customer’s bank account via IMPS (Immediate Payment Service) and NEFT (National Electronic Fund Transfer).
D2: A charge of ₹10.00 will be levied from the beneficiary for e-KYC registration.
D3: For any reason, domestic money transfer (DMT) made to a wrong account will neither be refunded nor transferred to any other account. Please verify the account number before transferring money.
D4: Through Domestic Money Transfer (DMT), a customer can send up to ₹5,000 per transaction and a maximum of ₹25,000 per month per beneficiary mobile number.
D5: If any transaction is pending, it will be approved within transaction date + two banking days.
D6: As per new guidelines, Aadhaar number is mandatory for beneficiary registration. The beneficiary must follow these steps: First enter the 10-digit sender mobile number > enter OTP (sent by service provider bank) > enter Aadhaar card number > successfully scan fingerprint.
D7: Once a transaction is pending, it cannot be submitted without entering the OTP (OTP will be sent to the sender mobile number).

SP4: Self-pay service is only for the retailer’s own business transactions. Please note that it cannot be used for DMT transactions. If you send money to any party, for security reasons we will have to do proper KYC of the beneficiary.

Security.Set SIM: Once activated, it will only work when your registered SIM is in the same mobile, which will easily prevent any kind of fraud. No one will be able to log in without your consent.
Security.Screen Lock: This feature allows you to manage application login through your mobile screen lock security. You can set the lock to open with PIN, fingerprint, and face.
Security.OTP setting: One Time Password {OTP} is an additional security layer to avoid security risks which is mandatory. We have some types of OTP security layers that you can choose according to your convenience.
Security.Change L & P: Here you can change your login password, which is very important to change from time to time for security reasons. All main information related to password security is given on the next page.
Security.Forget PIN: If you have forgotten or want to change your transaction PIN, click here. The transaction PIN works for financial transactions, without a transaction PIN you cannot complete your financial transaction.
Security.Registration: You can register one or more mobile devices. Your application will not be accessible from any other device. You will only be able to access and use services from registered devices.
Security.Manage Login: With this feature you can manage your login on both platforms (website and mobile application), use both platforms if needed otherwise block according to your choice. Click here to manage it.

about_company_text_1: Radiant Cash Management Services Limited cater to broad set of outsourcing requirements pertaining to cash management services for banks, financial institutions, organized retail and e-commerce companies in India. Company operate our business across five verticals.
about_company_text_2: Depending on the volume, the company uses multiple modes of transport for movement of cash and valuables, two wheelers, hired vehicles and specially built armoured vans. The company handles cash transactions of around Rs 5000 - 6000 million daily from all the customers.
about_company_text_3: The Company services under this segment consist of cash collection from end user and deposit into company current accounts and subsequent transfer to the client’s accounts either on the same day or on the next working day. The Company believes that our network of more than 60,000 touch points and a wide network of bank accounts with various banks across the country allows use to offer a unique value proposition to company clients, especially private sector and foreign banks, with limited branch networks.

cash_deposit_ac_list_desc: Through this function we are sharing with you the list of Radiant Cash Management Services Limited bank accounts and QR Codes in which you can Deposit Cash, Online Transfer and QR Code Scan.
cash_online_deposit_desc: In this report, the money deposited by RCE in the bank cash counter, the money deposited in the Cash Deposit Machine (CDM) and the money transferred by any other online mode can be seen in this report.
cash_pickup_prepay_desc: Money is picked up by RCE from the customer point or dropped off by the customer and through whatever medium the money is given to the company, the complete credit debit report will be in this ledger.
cash_pickup_report_desc: This report will give complete details of payment collection done by the RC from the customer location, whether the RCE has made the payment through digital slip or through physical slip.
checklist_confirmation: Yes, I have checked all the details and also got it verified from store contact person that the information is completely correct and I will take further action.
cms_ac_list_desc: Below is the list of accounts available for cash deposit in Radiant Cash Management Services Limited. Please choose the appropriate account as per your convenience. You can choose any branch where you do not have to face the crowd and your time is also not wasted.

cms_verify_otp_msg: . If everything is okay, complete the transaction by entering the OTP. The OTP has been sent to the store contact person with the details of the total amount.
company_docs_deposit_desc: To deposit cash in banks, some important documents of the company may be required, such as PAN Card, which is required in most banks. Some banks may also ask for additional documents, download documents from here.
contact_person_number_given_below: Contact person and number are given below,
dark_mode_content: In Dark Mode, all colors are fixed and cannot be changed. Once Dark Mode is enabled, any changes to the default colors will not remove Dark Mode. To remove Dark Mode, you must manually turn off the button.
deposit_slip_cms_desc: Some banks require a separate deposit slip to deposit money. All the slips required for these banks can be downloaded from here and you can use them by taking a print out (Print Slip)of them.

label: Label
locationMsg: Dear Business Partner, your safety is our top priority, you can manage login and transaction permissions according to your area. We can add login permission for up to 3 cities for security purposes.
location_outside_message: You are currently outside the Customer Center geofencing area, so we cannot allow you to proceed further.
location_solution_1: 1. If you are at the right location, turn on or reset your Google Location.
location_solution_2: 2. If you are outside, enter the geofence. If you are too close but not inside, enter inside and try again.
location_solution_3: 3. Turn on Google Location Accuracy: This will give you the most accurate location.
location_solution_4: 4. If any other issue exists, contact Customer Service.
loginPlateMsg: For security, the following login platforms are available to you. If you need to change the login platform, please call customer care.
login_credentials_blank: Please enter valid User ID and Password, you cannot leave it blank
mis: All major settings are in this function you can change your app language as per your convenience we have most of the Indian languages in this app You can manage screen display mode notification settings and other important settings
mobile_exists_error: Your Mobile Number Already Exists With Us. Please Try Another Number
modechange: If you want to change the transaction mode, click the button below
mratm: 1. M-ATM is a convenient way to withdraw cash from ₹500 to ₹10,000 and its transactions are counted towards the monthly transactions at the ATM. The bank charges the customer a transaction fee after the monthly transaction count is completed.
name: Name
no_dealer_token_error: Not Having Retailer Create Token Contact to Your Dealer
not_allowed_to_login_error: You are not allowed to login, please contact admin.
notshareidpass: Please don't share your password with anyone and don't use common passwords, it is necessary for your security.
on_the_same_day_or_on_the_next: on the same day or on the next
pan_length_error: PAN number must be at least 12 characters
panstatus: Check your name and PAN card number.
password_length_error: Password must be at least 5 digits
pay_picked_dues_desc: Through this function, you will see a list of all payments to be transferred to the company, as per the uploaded pickup slip. All these payments can be made separately or together.
payout_note: This applies when the commission is higher than the minimum guaranteed amount. You will receive whichever is higher — minimum guaranteed amount or commission.
pickup_deposit_ledger_desc: Money is picked up by RCE from the customer point or dropped off by the customer and through whatever medium the money is given to the company, the complete credit debit report will be in this ledger.
receipts submitted. Are you sure you wan: receipts submitted. Are you sure you want to submit?
req_civil: You must maintain a financial credit (CIBIL) score of at least 670. If your score is below this, you are not eligible.
req_collection: You must be able to collect money from company-authorized stores or offices within a 5 km radius and transfer the amount to the company within the specified time via deposit or online mode.
req_criminal: If you or any blood relative has a criminal record, has been convicted of a crime, or has a police history, you are not eligible for this service.
req_indian: You must be an Indian citizen with all KYC documents, a bank account, and a cheque book.
req_population: Your place of residence must have a population of more than 10,000.
req_travel: You must be physically able to travel and have access to a vehicle.
search_name_acc_no: Search by Name or Account Number
secondNotice: You can transfer money to any bank account via NEFT or IMPS for business purposes, salary, or other needs.
selfie_pending_msg: Selfie verification is pending. Click the button to contact the team.
set_additional_pin_desc: Your PIN code as per your documents is shown above. You can add up to 4 additional PIN codes if you work in other areas.
something_went_wrong_try_again_later: Something went wrong. Please try again later.
thNotice: Due to banking issues, 0.5% to 5% of transactions may remain pending. These are usually settled within 3 banking days. If not credited, the beneficiary should visit the bank with the UTR number and confirmation.
the_required_balance_is_not_available: The required balance is not available.
transfer_report_wallet_desc: View reports of payments from Main Wallet, POS Wallet, QR code, and UPI transactions.
update_description: A new version with improvements is available. Please update the app. If issues occur, reinstall the app.
update_troubleshoot: If the app does not update, please reinstall it.
usb_connected_msg: USB connection detected. Please disconnect it for security reasons.
usb_connected_note: Avoid using USB connection for security purposes.
usermsg: Dear Retailer, please use the safety features for your protection.
